title: Svetlichny
description: Schema for the (three-party) Svetlichny benchmark. Evaluates the canonical Svetlichny inequality S_3 on a GHZ_3 state shared between a chosen triple of qubits.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'Svetlichny' for this schema.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

qubits.description: Three distinct physical qubit indices on which to prepare GHZ_3 and run the benchmark.
